calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Annie A. Yang was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minors, Lawrence Larry Yang and Darrin Yang.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Zi Hui Wang, the minors' father, was present at today's hearing, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Lawrence Bowing Yang and Darrin Bozhe Yang.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
